name: Sage Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Butterfly the pork tenderloin and lay it open.
2. Place a sage leaf in each of the open cuts.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Fold back over and tie into its original shape.
5. Brown well directly over hot coals.
6. Remove to the edge of the grill.
7. Rub with olive oil.
8. Place additional sage sprigs onto the coals as desired.
9. Cover and cook until an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit is reached.
10. Carve into thin slices.
11. Serve hot, with a flavored butter.
